# Entry - AI Receptionist

> Entry is an AI-powered voice receptionist platform that answers business calls 24/7, books appointments, manages emails, and follows up with leads. Built for healthcare, trades, financial services, and service-based businesses across Australia and beyond. Entry replaces the need for a human receptionist at a fraction of the cost.

## Company Information

- Name: Entry
- Website: https://www.askentry.com
- Product type: AI voice receptionist SaaS platform
- Target market: Small-to-medium businesses (healthcare, trades, financial services)
- Headquarters: Australia
- App dashboard: https://app.askentry.com

## What Entry Does

Entry provides AI voice agents that answer phone calls on behalf of businesses. The AI receptionist can:

- Answer every inbound call 24/7, including after hours and weekends
- Book appointments directly into connected calendars (Calendly, Nookal, and more)
- Recognise returning customers and greet them by name
- Send SMS follow-ups to new leads automatically
- Manage a unified inbox combining calls, emails, and chat enquiries
- Generate AI summaries and smart email drafts
- Provide call recordings and full transcripts
- Integrate with CRMs and business tools (Gmail, HubSpot, Calendly, Nookal, ServiceM8)

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.askentry.com/): Overview of Entry's AI receptionist platform, features, and demo
- [Platform & Features](https://www.askentry.com/features): Detailed feature breakdown including voice agents, call management, and integrations
- [Pricing](https://www.askentry.com/pricing): Four-tier pricing from Free ($0/mo) to Pro ($599/mo)
- [Enterprise](https://www.askentry.com/enterprise): Enterprise solutions for larger organisations
- [Blog](https://www.askentry.com/blog): Articles on AI receptionists, industry guides, and product updates
- [Sign Up](https://www.askentry.com/onboarding): Free onboarding flow — enter your website and Entry's AI builds your receptionist automatically

## Pricing Plans

- **Free**: $0/month — 100 minutes, basic training, appointment booking, call logs, unified inbox
- **After Hours**: $99/month — 200 minutes, SMS lead follow-up, full customisation, client recognition, call recordings
- **Overflow** (most popular): $299/month — 700 minutes, website chatbot, advanced AI training, multi-calendar booking, automated email replies, 3 phone numbers, 5 team members, priority support
- **Pro**: $599/month — 2,000 minutes, custom CRM integration, 10 phone numbers, unlimited team members, API access

Additional minutes are available from $0.45 to $0.65 per minute depending on plan. Annual billing discounts are offered.

## Industries Served

- **Healthcare**: Medical practices, dental clinics, physiotherapy, allied health — reduce no-shows and never miss a patient call
- **Trades & Services**: Electricians, plumbers, builders, construction — capture leads while on the job
- **Financial Services**: Financial planners, accountants — professional call handling for client-facing firms
- **General Service Businesses**: Any business that receives inbound phone calls and books appointments

## Key Integrations

- Calendly (appointment scheduling)
- Nookal (practice management for allied health)
- Gmail (email management)
- HubSpot (CRM)
- ServiceM8 (job management for trades)
- Custom CRM via API (Pro plan)

## Blog Articles

- [AI Receptionist for Medical Practices in Australia: The Complete 2026 Guide](https://www.askentry.com/blog/ai-receptionist-medical-practice-australia): How AI receptionists help Australian medical practices answer every call, reduce no-shows, and save $40K+ per year
